content:
Технический SEO анализ проблем
1. URL URL адреса длиной более 80 символов негативно влияют на индексацию и SEO ранжирование. На сайте megateh.ee найдено 669 слишком длинных URL адресов.
Структура URL мешает Google высоко ранжировать, например вот это категорически плохо и неверно: www.megateh.fi/fi/uusimmat-tuotteemme
2. Cсылки Слишком много бессмысленных ссылок на другие страницы сайта Внутренняя перелинковка очень плохая. Слишком много ссылок на другие ненужные страницы. На 3108 страницах аж ДВЕСТИ ТЫСЯЧ ссылок на них самих.
Поломанные ссылки. На сайте megateh.ee найдено 538 ссылок, которые ведут в никуда, и этим сбивают роботов Google, и это понижает позицию в выдаче.
Страницы на которых слишком много ссылок На сайте megateh.ee найдено 1725 страниц, на которых слишком много ссылок на другие страницы. Это вводит в заблуждение Google, и понижает позицию в выдаче.
Dofollow внешние ссылки По ссылкам наружу из сайта утекает т.н. Link Juice или авторитет. Их нужно ставить с большой осторожностью и вниманием. На сайте megateh.ee найдено 5192 внешние ссылки, что примерно на 5150 больше, чем следует :)
3. Изображения Отсутствующие изображения На сайте megateh.ee найдено 72 отсутствующих или поломанных изображений, что является грехом в глазах Google.
Пустой alt текст Альтернативный текст для изображения - это очень важный для Google элемент ранжирования. Он должен содержать важную информацию о картинке, лучше всего связанную с названием товара. На сайте megateh.ee найдено 311 изображений без прописанного ALT текста.
Бессмысленный alt и title текст Во многих товаров в Альтернативном тексте и атрибуте TITLE указано название файла, что никак не помогает Google, и раздражает его. Например:
URL продукта: https://www.megateh.ee/tooted/partizan-videovalve-ip-komplektid/partizan-2mp-outdoor-wi-fi-komplekt-ip-39-4xcam-1xnvr HTML код изображения:
<img class="pic" src="/files/products/00/53/42/outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg" alt="outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg" title="outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg"> Текущий неправильный ALT text: outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg
Текущий неправильный, бессмысленный и дублирующий TITLE text: outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg
Правильный ALT: 2MP Outdoor Wi-Fi komplekt IP-39 4xCAM + 1xNVR
Правильный TITLE: IP Videovalve - Outdoor wireless - Partizan
Названия изображений товаров Очень важно чтобы названия изображений содержали ключевые слова из названия товара. На сайте многие изображения названы неверно. Например:
URL продукта: https://www.megateh.ee/tooted/partizan-videovalve-ip-komplektid/partizan-2mp-outdoor-wi-fi-komplekt-ip-39-4xcam-1xnvr
Название продукта: “Partizan 2MP Outdoor Wi-Fi komplekt IP-39 4xCAM + 1xNVR”
Проблемы:
URL изображения содержит излишне глубокую структуру вложенных папок: /files/products/00/53/42/outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg
Текущее неправильное название заглавной картинки: outdoor-wireless-kit-pack_store.jpg
Как должна была бы правильно называться: partizan-2mp-outdoor-wi-fi-komplekt-ip-39-4xcam-1xnvr.jpg
URL продукта, Заголовок продукта, название изображений товара должны содержать одинаковые, хорошо структурированные ключевые слова
4. Структура категорий Лучше всего поддерживать древовидную структуру инфраструктуры, где под-категории имеют только одну родительскую категорию. Надо стремиться к трехуровневой древовидной структуре: мета-категория → категория-ветвь → категория-лист
На сайте полный беспорядок в структуре, который не дает Google правильно проиндексировать и высоко ранжировать. Например:
Мета категория: Videovalvesüsteemid - слишком длинное название, люди вряд ли будут так искать, правильнее было бы назвать Videovalve
URL категории: /tooted/videovalve - правильнее было бы сделать категорию так: /product-category/videovalve или /videovalve
дальше, в этой мета-категории есть категория-ветвь “IP kaamerad”, URL которой критически неверно называется /tooted/valvekaamerad. Теряется ключевое слово в самом важном месте. Правильнее было бы назвать /videovalve/ip-kaamerad
дальше, в этой мета-категории есть категория-ветвь с названием производителя PARTIZAN, что уже неверно, т.к. производитель - это Атрибут товара, а не категория-ветвь. URL производителя /tooted/partizan, а должен был бы быть например /manufacturer/partizan
Но это еще не все. Ненужная категория-ветвь PARTIZAN содержит еще одну дублирующую подкатегорию “IP kaamerad”. URL /tooted/partizan-ip-valvekaamerad, что вообще запутывает Google и не содержит ни одного важного мета ключевого слова
5. Атрибуты товаров Важно чтобы атрибуты (свойства) продуктов не представляли из себя просто текстовые строки в описании товара. Атрибуты должны быть отдельными, кликабельными элементами по которым можно осуществлять:
поиск индексацию группировку Для этого необходима правильная структура базы данных товаров. Вот отличный пример как должно быть:
https://partizanstore.eu/products/wifi-ip-39-4-cam/
Название атрибута: Image sensor
Значение атрибута: 1/2.8" Full HD CMOS
URL атрибута: …
title: megateh.ee

content:
Overview 💡 As a full-service digital marketing agency, JINN.ee takes great delight in assisting companies of all sizes to succeed online. Our team specializes in creating websites and online stores that are SEO-optimized and designed to attract in and convert more people into paying consumers. But our services don’t end there; they also include SEO, social media marketing (SMM), search engine marketing (SEM), pay-per-click (PPC) advertising on Google and Facebook, content marketing, competitive analysis, business intelligence, and even cyber security audits.
💬 We can assist you in dominating your market and outshining the competitors with our all-inclusive strategy. As we design a tailored digital marketing strategy that gets results, we’ll work directly with you to fully comprehend your company, your objectives, and your target market. Our team of accomplished experts will use their experience to increase customer traffic, lead generation, and sales for your company.
👉 However, we don’t simply concentrate on short-term successes; we also adopt a long-term approach and work to build lasting relationships with our clients. We’ll be there for you every step of the way, offering constant assistance, direction, and knowledge to assist you in navigating the dynamic world of digital marketing. You may rest easy knowing that JINN.ee is by your side, supporting your online success.
Reasons SEO optimization: We understand the importance of SEO for the success of online stores, and we go above and beyond to ensure that every store we develop is optimized for search engines. This can help improve your ranking in search results and attract the right audience.
Customization: JINN.ee can provide custom development solutions to meet your unique requirements and goals. Whether you need a basic store or a more complex and feature-rich platform, we have the skills and resources to deliver.
User-friendly interface: We prioritize user experience and work tirelessly to create intuitive and easy-to-navigate online stores. This can help improve the overall user experience and increase the chances of converting visitors into paying customers.
Expertise: JINN.ee has a deep understanding of WooCommerce and the specific requirements of online stores. This expertise can help ensure that your store is developed to the highest standards and meets all of your needs.
Payment gateways: We can integrate a variety of payment gateways into your online store to ensure that customers can easily make purchases and complete transactions. This can help improve the overall shopping experience and increase sales.
Product management: We offer tools and features to help you easily manage and update your products, including the ability to create and edit product pages, set prices and discounts, and track inventory levels.
Marketing and promotion: We can help you leverage the built-in marketing and promotion features of WooCommerce to drive traffic and sales to your store, including coupons, email marketing, and social media integration.
Ongoing support: We offer ongoing support to ensure that your online store remains in top condition and meets all of your needs. This can include assistance with updates, troubleshooting, and any other issues that may arise.
Scalability: WooCommerce is a highly scalable platform that can grow with your business. Whether you’re just starting out or looking to expand, we can help you build a store that meets your current and future needs.
Profitability: By working with JINN.ee to develop a WooCommerce online store, you can increase the profitability of your business through improved sales, streamlined processes, and a better overall user experience.
Ready to speak with a SEO expert? Send Us a Message, Book a Video Chat or call now at +372 55514747 for a personalized approach.
summary: Websites and online stores that are SEO-optimized and designed to attract in and convert more people into paying consumers.
title: 10 reasons why you should hire JINN.ee to create a WooCommerce online store or a website that is SEO-optimized

SEO case studies and E-commerce SEO success stories
The Business:
geekshopestonia.ee The shop for geeks and anime fans
The Summary of Success:
https://www.google.com/search?q=geek+shop
Number 1 Out of 600 Million Results for “Geek Shop” Keyword 2300 Pages in Google Top-5 Results Organic Search Traffic up 300% Revenue up 240% The Story of Success:
The client was looking to stand out in a crowded market of toys and collectibles, and we were happy to help them achieve fantastic results. We were able to bring their website to the #1 position out of an overwhelming 716 million results for the main niche keyword “geek shop”. Not only that, but we also helped increase their online exposure by securing approximately 2300 pages with first impressions in Google’s top five results. But the real victory was in the numbers. Our efforts led to a whopping 300% increase in organic search traffic to geekshopestonia.ee, which directly resulted in a 240% increase in company’s revenue.
Our Role:
Web Development: Private server with daily full backups E-Commerce Development: WooCommerce Ecommerce Marketing Search Engine Optimization Pay Per Click: Facebook ads Local SEO Contact us today to schedule a consultation and get a quote for your project The Business:

The Summary of Success:
https://www.google.com/search?q=newborn+festival
Number 1 Out of 31 Million Results for “newborn festival” Keyword Organic Search traffic up 250% Organic Social traffic up 1570% ROI 800% The Story of Success:
We did a fantastic job for the Newborn Fest! Not only did we get them to the top spot on Google with 31 million results for the keyword “newborn festival” but we also brought in a ton of organic traffic to their website. We increased their organic search traffic by a whopping 250% and organic social traffic by an incredible 1570%. The best part? They saw a return on investment of 800%! Our marketing strategies really paid off for this festival and we couldn’t be more proud of the results.
Our Role:
Web Design Web Development UX/UI Design Business Consulting Search Engine Optimization Social Media Marketing Pay Per Click: Facebook ads with custom tailored audience The Business:
lastefoto.ee The Photography Studio
The Summary of Success:
https://www.google.com/search?q=lastefotograaf
Number 1 Out of 6000 Results for “lastefotograaf” Keyword Organic Search traffic up 670% Organic Social traffic up 350% 120 Pages in Google Top-5 Results Revenue up 491% The Story of Success:
We tackled a whole bunch of tasks for the LasteFoto studio, including web design and development, sprucing up the user experience with UX/UI design, making sure they showed up on the first page of Google with our search engine optimization skills, boosting their social media presence, creating killer content, and even running some ads on Facebook and Google. We even helped with their local SEO efforts.
The results were nothing short of stunning. After our efforts, the studio landed the #1 spot in Google out of a 8000 results for their niche ONE-WORD keyword “lastefotograaf” (meaning “child photographer” in Estonian). Their organic search traffic to the website skyrocketed by 670% and their organic social traffic increased by a whopping 350%. With our help, the studio had a staggering 120 pages showing up in Google’s top-five results. And, get this, the studio’s revenue increased by an impressive 491% and continues to grow each year!
Our Role:
Web Design Web Development UX/UI Design Search Engine Optimization Social Media Marketing Content marketing Pay Per Click: Facebook ads, Google ads Local SEO Ready to speak with a SEO expert? Send Us a Message, Book a Video Chat or call now at +372 55514747 for a personalized approach.

content:
Our search engine optimization services include a personalized strategy, cutting-edge technology and a smart SEO professionals backed up by 15 years of experience.
We work to increase revenue for our clients and provide every piece of technologies and services required for your business to grow with SEO. Are you tired of your website languishing on page 10 of Google’s search results? Are you ready to attract more qualified traffic and increase your online revenue? If so, it’s time to invest in search engine optimization (SEO) services from our agency.
What is SEO? SEO is the practice of optimizing your website and its content in order to rank higher in search engine results pages (SERPs) and earn more relevant traffic. It’s an essential part of any digital marketing strategy, as it helps ensure that your website is visible to the right audience at the right time.
Our SEO experts has a wealth of experience in helping businesses just like yours improve their online visibility and drive more traffic to their websites. We use a data-driven approach to identify the keywords and phrases that your target audience is searching for, and then optimize your website’s content and structure to rank for those terms.
In addition to on-page optimization, we also focus on off-page factors such as link building and social media engagement. These efforts help to establish your website as a credible and trustworthy source, further improving your search rankings.
But SEO isn’t just about driving traffic – it’s also about converting that traffic into paying customers. That’s why we work closely with you to understand your business goals and develop a customized SEO strategy that delivers the results you need.
If you are ready to take your online presence to the next level and start seeing a real return on your investment:
Contact us today to learn more and schedule a consultation.
SEO process The SEO process begins with a thorough analysis of your website and your competitors.
We identify any technical issues that may be hindering your search engine performance and work to fix them.
We also conduct keyword research to identify the phrases and terms that your target audience is using to find products or services like yours.
Once we have a solid understanding of your website and your goals, we develop a customized SEO plan to improve your search engine rankings. This may include on-page optimization, such as optimizing titles and meta descriptions, as well as off-page tactics like link building and local SEO.
In addition to improving your search engine rankings, we are good in conversion rate optimization (CRO). We work to not only bring more traffic to your website, but to also ensure that those visitors are taking desired actions, such as making a purchase or filling out a contact form.
Ready to speak with a SEO expert? Book a Video Chat or call now at +372 55514747 for a personalized approach.
summary: SEO services can be a big component of leads and sales. JINN.ee has a proven track record of assisting businesses like yours in growing through SEO.
title: SEO Services That Grow Traffic and Increase Revenue
